description.value: Your gobbing is renowned across the galaxy's infospheres, making you something of an urban legend. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Combat Hack] skill feat. Hackers and frequent infosphere users against whom you succeed at a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Battle Gobbing] or Combat Hack check recognize your handiwork, granting you a +1 status bonus to Deception checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Lie], [[/act create-a-diversion]], or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Legendary Troll] those creatures for 1 minute.
